17

I have applied the changes and ran the code again. 
However, as you can see in the project attachments, 
there are still problems. 
I fixed this error 
    /home/kushal/src/dotnet/myrestaurant/src/MyRestaurant.WebApplication/Components/Account/Pages/ChangePasswordRequired.razor(139,13): error CS0103: The name 'SecurityEventType' does not exist in the current context
by literally disambiguiating it 
    SecurityEventType.ForcedPasswordChangeCompleted);
to
    MyRestaurant.Domain.Authentication.SecurityEventType.ForcedPasswordChangeCompleted);
However, there are still four warnings
